title: Brent Crude surges 3.2% amid Strait of Hormuz shipping concerns
summary: Rising tensions in the Strait of Hormuz have caused Brent crude prices to spike 3.2%, threatening fuel supply chains across the Indian subcontinent.

title: India crude import dependency remains at 85% — OMC advance payments activated
summary: India's oil marketing companies have activated advance payment protocols in response to elevated import dependency and international price volatility.

title: Red Sea shipping disruptions push global freight rates up 12%
summary: Houthi attacks on commercial vessels in the Red Sea corridor are disrupting shipping lanes, causing freight rates to spike and affecting supply chains globally.

title: India power grid demand reaches 215 GW — coal inventories being monitored
summary: Summer heat wave is pushing electricity demand to seasonal highs. Coal inventories at thermal plants are under review to ensure uninterrupted supply.

title: Wheat futures jump 1.8% after Black Sea corridor update
summary: Black Sea grain corridor logistics update has caused short-term volatility in wheat futures, with India's PDS stocks assessed as adequate through next quarter.

title: OPEC+ extends production cuts through Q2 2025 — supply squeeze expected
summary: OPEC+ nations have collectively agreed to extend production cuts into Q2 2025, which analysts expect will further tighten global crude supply.

title: Maharashtra transport strike disrupts Pune-Mumbai freight corridor
summary: A 48-hour transport strike has disrupted cargo movement between Pune and Mumbai, creating bottlenecks at logistics hubs and delaying essential commodity deliveries.

title: Solar power generation in western India hits record high
summary: Record solar generation in Rajasthan and Gujarat is offsetting thermal plant stress, providing positive buffer for Maharashtra grid stability.

title: Kharif sowing season forecast positive — food inflation pressure expected to ease
summary: IMD forecasts adequate monsoon this year, supporting expectations of normal kharif crop yields and easing pressure on food price indices.

title: Pune ring road expansion delays causing logistics diversions
summary: Ongoing infrastructure expansion on the Pune ring road is forcing heavy vehicles onto inner city routes, increasing transit time for freight deliveries.

title: US sanctions on Iranian oil shipments tighten — Asia importers scramble
summary: New US sanctions targeting Iranian crude exports are forcing Asian refiners to seek alternative suppliers, increasing demand pressure on Middle East crude.

title: Maharashtra DISCOM announces scheduled load shedding in rural areas
summary: Maharashtra's power distribution company has announced 2-hour load shedding rotation in rural zones to manage peak summer demand. Urban Pune unaffected.

title: India-UAE food import corridor sees 15% increase in inbound cargo
summary: Trade volume on the India-UAE corridor is up 15%, reflecting strong demand for edible oil and pulses. Port capacity at Nhava Sheva is under observation.

title: Natural gas prices in Europe surge 8% — LNG re-exports to Asia possible
summary: European gas price spike may redirect LNG cargoes away from Asia, slightly tightening India's gas supply and affecting gas-based power generation.

title: IOC Pune terminal receives full tanker — fuel buffer replenished
summary: Indian Oil Corporation confirms successful delivery to the Pune storage terminal. Current fuel buffer for the city is estimated at 56 hours across all OMC outlets.
